subject: Automating client intake at BSH Austin Law
body:
Hi,

I came across BSH Austin Law and noticed your practice serves clients in the Austin area. Client intake at law firms often involves a lot of back-and-forth: collecting information, running conflict checks, sending engagement letters.

We help law firms automate the intake process so new clients fill out smart forms online, documents route to the right attorney, and engagement letters go out automatically. Saves hours per new client.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
painPoints: No visible automation in client communication
